_comment: Briefing Officer (Col. Hendricks, S-2) expression set for High Command. Generated with Nano Banana Pro. 'officer-neutral' is generated first with no reference; the other three pass it as a reference image (ref) so it is the SAME officer with only the expression changed. Solid dark-navy background matches the in-game card (#0B1020), so no background removal is needed. Run: python scripts/assetgen/generate.py scripts/assetgen/manifests/officer-portraits.json

defaults.prompt_prefix: Flat 2D vector cartoon character portrait, chest-up and centered, of a distinguished senior air-force officer (colonel rank), a man in his late 50s with a square jaw and lightly greying temples
defaults.prompt_suffix: wearing dark air-force-blue service dress uniform, a peaked service cap with gold scrambled-egg braid on the visor and a gold cap badge, gold aviator wings badge over a multi-row colored ribbon rack on the chest, gold rank shoulder boards; clean thick outlines, simple cel-shading, muted navy-blue and gold palette, solid dark navy background color hex 0B1020, no text, no logo, square framing, high quality

assets.name: officer-neutral
assets.prompt: calm composed neutral expression, level brows, mouth in a straight line, looking at the viewer

assets.name: officer-alert
assets.prompt: Keep the exact same officer, uniform, cap, badges and art style as the reference image. Change ONLY the facial expression to focused and alert: brows lowered and angled inward, narrowed determined eyes, firm set mouth

assets.name: officer-pleased
assets.prompt: Keep the exact same officer, uniform, cap, badges and art style as the reference image. Change ONLY the facial expression to pleased and approving: relaxed slightly raised brows, warm confident closed-mouth smile

assets.name: officer-grim
assets.prompt: Keep the exact same officer, uniform, cap, badges and art style as the reference image. Change ONLY the facial expression to grim and concerned: heavily furrowed brows, worried eyes, downturned frowning mouth
